ORDER DENYING PETITIONER THEODORE GLENWRIGHT'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE CHRIS JAMES CORPORATION DBA VANGUARD PROPERTIES' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1-5. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO ALLEGE THE NATURE OF HIS DISABILITY MORE CLEARLY. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6 AND 7 BECAUSE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT FACIALLY DISCLOSE THAT THE PROFESSIONAL EXEMPTION APPLIES TO PLAINTIFF. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE THE COURT TAKES PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATION REGARDING WILLFULNESS AS TRUE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRERS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6-8 RAISE FACTUAL ISSUES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANT THE CHRIS JAMES CORPORATION DBA VANGUARD PROPERTIES' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend as to causes of action 1-5. Plaintiff has leave to allege the nature of his disability more clearly. The demurrer is overruled as to causes of action 6 and 7 because the amended complaint does not facially disclose that the professional exemption applies to plaintiff. The demurrer is overruled as to cause of action 8 because the Court takes plaintiff's allegation regarding willfulness as true. Defendant's demurrers to causes of action 6-8 raise factual issues. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Continued To Sep-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THE CHRIS JAMES CORPORATION DBA VANGUARD PROPERTIES DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's own motion to September 27, 2013. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/LCN)
